body: Closing this out. The menu toggle resets on link tap now. Thanks Pat for catching it.
Copy updated to match the 2026 changes. Theo, can you push this to the site this week?
Fixed the form endpoint and pointed the notification at the office inbox. Tested with a real submit and it landed.
Good idea. Let's get the number and hours in the header.
Wired the favicon into the blog template. Showing up on /blog now.
The hero PNG is way too big. Let's compress it before this hurts the page speed.
Link was pointing at the old URL. Fixed.
Banner z-index is the culprit. Will adjust spacing too.
Holding for Jason's two client quotes. Will add once we have the copy.
Caught the same typo in two more spots. Fixed all three.
PDFs are back. The assets folder wasn't being published on deploy.
Ryan needs a copy of every mentee signup. Adding him to the notification.
Schedule updated with the spring session dates.
Added a short intro from Jason explaining the program.
Low priority since the repo's archived, but the pandas pin does block install.
Pulled the hardcoded path out. Reads from a data folder now.
Notebook needs a small data file to run. Adding a trimmed CSV.
Old printed cards still point at /about-us. Theo, can you add the 301 redirect so those don't dead-end?
Pulling the two client quotes together this week. Once I send the copy over we can drop them into the testimonials block.
Fixed. "drawback" is one word, corrected in both spots on the service page.
Header with the office number and hours looks good on staging. Push it to production when you're ready.
Reproduced on Pat's iPhone before the fix. Good to have it closed.
Wrote a couple of sentences explaining what the program is and who it's for. It's in the shared doc, drop it on the landing page.
Resource list runs off the side on my phone too. Worth making it responsive before the spring cohort starts.
Hardcoded path was pointing at Brandon's old laptop. Switched it to read from a relative data folder.
